channel.title: Kiwi's Dream Feed
channel.description: Not sure if anyone is remotely interested in this blog

item.title: 16 Jun 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: Alright

The first part of the story is me being late to the flight to my grad trip, so instead of going on a bus or any transportation, I decided to fly to the airport because apparently it's the fastest way. However, I did get lost a few times. After I got there, I realised my boyfriend hasn't arrived, so I was panicking.

The second part is me wandering in some sort of park. But midway, I lost my hamster plush, so I went everywhere to find it, but only finding similar looking plushies. Fortunately, I realised the hamster plush is inside my bad. Happy ending!

item.title: 14 Jun 2026
item.description:
Category: Absurd | Rating: Weirdly happy

It's a dream where I see eagles being hunted, and where I went to an event with a really good host. Gave me an ridiculous amount of dopamine.

item.title: 11 Jun 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: ???

I watched Hazbin Hotel and laughed when a character said fuck many times in a row.

item.title: 22 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Update | Rating: Cool

Had a dream where drv3 got a new storyline kinda like 2x2, new killer and new deaths, and Kirumi got to live up til chap 4

item.title: 9 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: Good

had a dream where a club keeps a lot of character nui dolls, i even found one based off my sona, but it has ink bleed

item.title: 7 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: Strange?

Had a dream I picked up two birbs from the park because they arent moving.

After taking care of them for a while at home, I went back to the park and released them. But I realised I forgot where one of them went, so I was rushing back home.

On my way, I saw a woman with many cats, we started a conversation, shes quite chill.

After saying goodbye to the woman and her friends, I seemed to have went on a weird path, and ended up in an alternate world in a post apocalyptic-ish setting.

Everyone spoke an entirely different language, but somehow my phone still worked, and I decided to text my sister... Then the dream ended.

item.title: 4 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Nightmare | Rating: Oh God No

Had a dream that revealed that shadow milk is the one who caused timekeeper to become a chronokinetic, its some weird time travel stuff

item.title: 3 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: Bad

Had a dream the entire school has to draw a comic as an assignment, but i forgot to finish it

item.title: 2 May 2026
item.description:
Category: Casual | Rating: Cute

I saw Pikmins and they are bug sized

item.title: 26 Apr 2026
item.description:
Category: Multi-Story | Rating: Sad

Had a dream i went on a spaceship, and had to say goodbye with someone. We kept shouting goodbye and love you over and over until we cant hear each other. It made me feel extremely sad, knowing i wont meet her anymore

Also had another dream me and some other person have to destroy a contract paper, we managed to draw all over it, but got found out. We tried to run, but my character stopped cuz her father (who was on the company’s side) got hurt, causing us to be caught. Nobody knows why we betrayed them, they were all heartbroken
